svg.text: 1. ALL PIPING AND VALVES SHALL BE SIZED PER PROCES...
2. TEMPERATURE AND PRESSURE ARE AT NORMAL OPERATIN...
3. ALL INSTRUMENTS SHALL CONFORM TO ISA 5.1 STANDA...
4. ELEVATIONS ARE TO CENTER-LINE OF PIPE UNLESS NO...
5. ALL CONTROL VALVES FAIL-SAFE AS SHOWN.
6. DRAIN AND VENT VALVES SHALL BE PROVIDED WHERE R...
7. ALL PIPE CONNECTIONS SHALL BE FLANGED UNLESS NO...
8. RELIEF VALVES SHALL BE SET PER PROCESS DATA SHE...
9. LINE DESIGNATIONS PER PIPING SPEC INDEX.
10. ALL WELDING SHALL CONFORM TO ASME B31.3.
11. INSTRUMENT AIR SUPPLY AT 100 PSIG MINIMUM.
12. SEE P&ID LEGEND FOR SYMBOL DEFINITIONS.
